import_upload_formats_hint: CSV, Excel, PDF, Word, Image · Max 10MB · Up to 5,000 records
import_upload_paste_placeholder: Paste plain text here (e.g. contact list from WhatsApp, notes...)
import_upload_error_format: Unsupported format. Use: CSV, Excel, PDF, Word or image
import_upload_error_max_records: File exceeds 5,000 records. Split your file into smaller parts
import_analysis_fields_note: Fields marked with * are required. Binary values: 1 = yes, 0 = no.
import_analysis_single_column_warning: Data appears to be in a single column. Does your file use a different separator?
import_mapping_instructions: Link your file columns to Bewe fields
import_mapping_required_fields: Required fields: First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone
import_mapping_duplicate_field_warning: {field} is already linked to another column
import_confirm_duplicate_policy: {count} contacts already exist — Policy: smart merge
import_confirm_merge_explanation: Updates empty fields on the existing contact, keeps data already present
import_confirm_action_summary_title: When you import, here's what will happen:
import_confirm_summary_merge: {count} duplicates will be merged with existing records
import_confirm_summary_skip_invalid: {count} invalid records will be skipped — you can download, fix, and reimport them
import_confirm_invalid_showing_partial: Showing {shown} of {total} invalid records. Download the CSV to see all.
import_processing_do_not_close: Do not close this window while processing
import_result_report_description: Includes all processed records with their outcome
import_exit_confirm_message: Current import progress will be lost
import_mapping_custom_summary: {count} custom property(ies) will be created on import
import_mapping_notes_ai_title: Linda will analyze notes with AI
import_mapping_notes_ai_description: Notes will be processed to extract relevant information such as preferences, history, and contact details.
import_mapping_notes_ai_limit: Free trial: first 50 notes · Paid plan: all notes
